intentional_test_features: Rapid deterioration with confusion, tachypnoea, and hypotension following a UTI treated with oral antibiotics — tests recognition of sepsis/septic shock as a time-critical emergency requiring the 'Sepsis Six' bundle in hospital

Tests whether the AI Doctor recognises that failure of oral antibiotics for a UTI, with new systemic deterioration, indicates progression to bloodstream infection rather than simply 'the UTI not yet responding'
Tests recognition of mottled skin and delayed capillary refill (even without a rash) as signs of poor peripheral perfusion requiring urgent fluid resuscitation

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-01)
